steps.title: Identify the shift in focus
steps.content: The examples (Arkansas 1997, Maine 1999) show specific instances where soil designations occurred years after selection. The next sentence generalizes this pattern—it's not describing those specific cases, but the typical phenomenon: years commonly elapse during the designation process.

steps.title: Match the transition logic
steps.content: Often directly captures the frequency of the pattern: years typically pass between selection and official designation. The other choices don't work: therefore would infer from the examples, but the explanation (slow legislative process) comes after the blank; similarly suggests an unwarranted parallel; indeed merely emphasizes. That matches choice A — A is correct.
